tutorial.message:
Welcome to Square Garden!
Slide a tile to swap it with its neighbor.
Drag any tile up, down, left, or right to make a swap.
Create a line of 3 RED tiles to win!

Each swap uses one move.
Watch your move counter!
Use fewer moves to earn more stars!

Try a longer line!
Create 4 GREEN tiles in a row.
Tap the hint button if you get stuck!
